decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing efficient creatures and disruption spells to control the game while putting pressure on the opponent's life total. By combining aggressive threats like Overlord of the Balemurk and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd with disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Skyclave Apparition, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while steadily advancing its own board presence. The inclusion of Yorion, Sky Nomad as a companion provides additional value and card advantage, allowing the deck to grind out long games and outvalue the opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to establish early board control and disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with aggressive creatures. The Dimir color combination allows for a mix of disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push, along with counterspells like Force of Will and Force of Negation to prevent the opponent from mounting a strong defense. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student helps to filter the deck and provide card advantage, while Orcish Bowmasters and Barrowgoyf serve as efficient threats to close out the game quickly. The deck also utilizes tempo plays like Daze and Brazen Borrower to keep the opponent off balance.

This deck focuses on using disruptive spells and efficient removal to control the board while deploying threats that can quickly end the game. By combining disruption, card advantage, and a fast clock, this deck aims to keep the opponent on the back foot and finish them off before they can stabilize. The key strategy is to use cards like Thoughtseize, Daze, and Fatal Push to disrupt the opponent's game plan while deploying threats like Nethergoyf and Murktide Regent to apply pressure and close out the game quickly.

The main focus of this Eldrazi Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively play powerful Eldrazi creatures like Reality Smasher and Thought-Knot Seer, utilizing mana acceleration from cards like Simian Spirit Guide and Lotus Petal. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Chalice of the Void to disrupt opponent's game plan. The land base is optimized to support the Eldrazi creatures with cards like Eldrazi Temple and Eye of Ugin. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with fast and efficient creatures while also disrupting their strategies.

The main focus of the deck is to quickly play out a variety of artifacts that can generate card advantage, disrupt opponent's strategies, and create a fast clock with aggro creatures. Cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Mishra's Bauble provide card selection and recurring value, while Urza's Saga and Mox Opal ramp out threats like Kappa Cannoneer and Patchwork Automaton. Chalice of the Void can shut down opposing decks, while cards like Force of Will and Sink into Stupor provide disruption and protection. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of artifacts and aggressive creatures.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly put out powerful Eldrazi creatures and disrupt opponents with cards like Kozilek's Command and Chalice of the Void. By using cards like Simian Spirit Guide and Lotus Petal, the deck can ramp into its threats quickly using Eldrazi Temple and Eye of Ugin. With a mix of aggressive creatures like Eldrazi Linebreaker and powerful finishers like Reality Smasher and Thought-Knot Seer, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its aggressive Eldrazi creatures while controlling the board with disruptive spells and abilities.

The deck aims to quickly get out powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier onto the battlefield using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. With the help of cards like Omniscience and Lotus Petal, the deck can easily overwhelm the opponent with big creatures and powerful spells. The strategy is to efficiently ramp up mana, disrupt the opponent with counterspells like Force of Will and Spell Pierce, and ultimately win the game by getting out big creatures and overwhelming the opponent with their powerful effects.

The main focus of this deck is to establish a lockdown strategy using artifacts and control elements to disrupt and control the opponent's actions. By using cards such as Trinisphere, Karn, the Great Creator, and Pithing Needle, the deck aims to limit the opponent's options and prevent them from effectively playing their cards. The inclusion of powerful artifacts like Ugin, Eye of the Storms and The One Ring serves to provide additional value and threats on the battlefield, while cards like Urza's Saga and Urza's Workshop help ramp up resources for the player. Overall, the deck aims to establish a strong prison-like strategy to control the pace of the game and emerge victorious.

The deck utilizes artifacts and control elements to create a prison-like effect, locking down the opponent's resources and limiting their options. By utilizing cards like Urza's Workshop, Karn, the Great Creator, and Trinisphere, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and create a difficult board state to deal with. With powerful cards like Ugin, the Eye of the Storms and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn, the deck can quickly close out the game once the opponent is locked down.

This deck focuses on utilizing lands as control elements to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By using cards like Crop Rotation and Life from the Loam, the deck can consistently search for key lands like Karakas, Rishadan Port, and The Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale to slow down the opponent. Cards like Sphere of Resistance and Malevolent Rumble further disrupt the opponent's spells, while cards like Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage provide a win condition. The deck aims to lock down the opponent's resources while establishing a powerful land base for its own game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining a steady aggressive tempo. Utilizing cards like Daze, Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to control the board and disrupt opponent's resources. The deck also includes efficient creatures like Barrowgoyf and Orcish Bowmasters to apply pressure on the opponent. With a mix of disruption, aggression, and card advantage, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and secure victory in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The main concept of this deck is to generate mana quickly with cards like Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual, using them to cast spells that generate card advantage like Burning Wish and Echo of Eons. The deck also aims to disrupt the opponent with Silence and Beseech the Mirror while setting up for a lethal Tendrils of Agony finish. Additionally, the inclusion of Song of Creation and Gaea's Will provide alternative win conditions. The deck utilizes various fetch lands and Mox Opal to fix mana and enable explosive plays, making it a versatile and powerful combo deck in the Legacy format.

This deck focuses on using lands as a control strategy. It aims to lock down the opponent's resources by utilizing cards like Thespian's Stage and Dark Depths to create a powerful Marit Lage token. The deck also includes cards like Wasteland and Ghost Quarter to disrupt the opponent's mana base. Life from the Loam helps to recur lands from the graveyard, while cards like Boseiju, Who Endures provide protection for key spells. Overall, the deck combines land-based control elements with a powerful win condition in Dark Depths to dominate the game.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature play with cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Amped Raptor, supported by removal spells like Swords to Plowshares. The deck also includes hand disruption with cards like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy. The mana base is designed to support the three-color combination of white, black, and red, allowing for consistent casting of powerful creatures and spells. The deck aims to apply early pressure on the opponent while maintaining a disruptive element to control the game.

This deck focuses on combining aggressive creatures with disruptive elements to control the game and outvalue opponents. By utilizing cards like Stoneforge Mystic to search for equipment and Aether Vial to cheat creatures into play, the deck aims to pressure opponents while disrupting their game plan with cards like Wasteland and Thoughtseize. Additionally, the deck includes powerful cards like Skyclave Apparition and Solitude for removal, as well as Recruiter of the Guard to search for key creatures. Overall, the deck aims to be proactive and disruptive, utilizing its creatures and disruptive elements to control the game.

The deck focuses on controlling the board while utilizing Lands as a resource. It includes cards like Exploration, Life from the Loam, and various utility lands to maintain tempo and disruption. The strategy involves using cards like Crop Rotation to search for key lands like Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage to create powerful combos, while also utilizing disruptive elements like Wasteland and Pithing Needle to hinder the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents through strategic land plays and efficient control elements.
